content.en:
"The bottleneck has been broken, and the vest has also become a sixth-time bone transformation realm's other shore-level genius!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

After he stabilized his realm, he began to do more tasks, so as to exchange the contribution points of the True Beast Alliance for the source stones on the other side.

He now has a very high status in the True Beast Alliance, and he is eligible to exchange for the Source Stone of the other side.

Thereupon.

He tries to complete as many tasks as he can, earning contribution points for himself.

Coupled with some of Jun Zu's help, his vest was even better in the True Beast Alliance than in Guheng Mountain.

But.

A vest is a vest after all, and the vest only has the mark of copying talent, but not copying talent itself.

Future.

He could abandon this vest at any time, so if he could transfer his resources to the real copy body, then transfer.

But the premise is that this vest can't be allowed to have problems at the moment.

With the resource supply of the True Beast Alliance, coupled with the resources of Gu Heng Mountain, Ye Tian's strength improvement speed is quite good.

Moreover, he is also continuing to study the golden embodiment of the other side.

Before, he was only transformed into a golden body on the other side of his arms, but now he gradually tried to create a corresponding method of the golden body on the other side of his body and his legs, so as to transform his golden body on the other side.

In this way, his strength will become stronger and stronger.

Other than that.

Ye Tian was still studying the Divine Weapon Casting Technique on the other side.

If you can create a high-level Divine Weapon Casting Technique and create a high-level Divine Soldier on the other side, it will be quite good.

Any high-level Divine Weapon Forge Master on the other side will have a very high status.

But if you want to become a high-level Divine Weapon Forger on the other side, the premise is that you have enough knowledge of both the Golden Script on the Other Side and the Haven on the Other Side.

Because the high-level Divine Soldiers on the other side need to use the Golden Script on the Other Side and the Black Script on the Other Side, they can't create a method for the creation of high-level Divine Soldiers without enough understanding.

"The high-level Divine Soldier is very precious, and if I become a High-Tier Divine Soldier Forger, I will be extremely rich. Moreover, with the high-level divine soldiers on the other side, my strength can also be greatly improved. "

Ye Tian thought so.

Time flies.

Ye Tian tried again and again, coupled with the fact that his comprehension was indeed very high, and he had mastered a lot of golden scripts and black scripts on the other side, plus there was information about Gu Heng Mountain, so in countless studies, he finally succeeded in creating the casting technique of the high-level divine weapon on the other side.

Thereupon.

On this day, he began to build a high-level divine weapon for himself.

To this end, he exchanged the top-grade materials from Gu Heng Mountain and the True Beast Alliance, and then began to build.

It takes a long time to build a high-level Divine Soldier, it may take dozens or even hundreds of primeval epochs, and there is also the possibility of failure.

Some high-level supernatural casters may fail dozens of times to create a high-level supernatural supernatural power, which will delay their cultivation very much.

However, Ye Tian had a copy body, so he could let a copy body refine to create a high-level divine weapon on the other side, without delaying his cultivation.

Soon.

At the beginning of the first refining and building, only three primeval epochs were started, and it failed, wasting a lot of resources and materials.

He wasn't discouraged, though.

He is not short of resources now, and the deduction of the high-level Divine Weapon Casting Method on the other side is correct, and he will not make mistakes.

Therefore, he continued to refine and build.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian failed again and again.

Finally, at the sixteenth time of refining, he succeeded in crafting a high-level divine spear.

"The Spear on the other side!"

Ye Tian gave this high-level god soldier a name.

With this High Divine Spear, his attack power is greatly increased.

But.

He didn't publicize the fact that he had become a high-level supernatural weapon caster, otherwise it would be very annoying for other lords to ask him to help refine high-level supernatural powers.

Therefore, he told no one.

Subsequently.

He continued to refine the high-level Divine Weapon on the other side for himself, and this time he was refining a high-level Divine Weapon of the Confinement Class, which was a little complicated, so he specially created this method of forging the high-level Divine Weapon of the Confinement Class.

After a period of research, he was able to successfully create it, and then began to refine it.

The long years passed.

After many refining, Ye Tian also successfully refined a set of close-fitting armor, which could be perfectly integrated with the skin.

This high-level divine weapon on the other side, Ye Tian named it the Lin Armor on the other side.

There were two high-level divine weapons on the other side, and Ye Tian also felt that it was almost over, so he didn't continue refining it for the time being.

The main thing is to refine high-level divine weapons on the other side, and the price paid is too great, and he has almost emptied his net worth!

If he continued to refine, he wouldn't be able to exchange so many materials.

......

this day.

The Lord of Eternal Zero came to find Ye Tian.

"Lord of Eternal Zero!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

At this time, the Lord of Eternal Zero said: "Lord of Endless, you should be very short of the source stones of the other side, but now there is a chance to obtain a large number of source stones of the other side." "

"What chance?"

Ye Tian's interest came.

The Lord of Eternal Zero said: "Very far away from our Ancient Heng Mountain, there is a relatively large area called the Taichao Domain. The Tai Chao Domain is very powerful, and there are more than a dozen of them that are comparable to the strength of our Gu Heng Mountain alone. One of the forces is called the Holy Mountain on the other side, and this force is very powerful, and it is also the most powerful strength in the Taichao Domain. This time, the Holy Mountain on the other side has united many forces and is preparing to hold an Eternal Genius Competition. If you get a good position, you can get a lot of rewards, including the source stone of the other side. "

After hearing this, Ye Tian was very surprised, "Lord of Eternal Zero, what is the benefit of holding such an Eternal Shore Genius Tournament with so many resources from the Holy Mountain on the other side?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero said: "Actually, this has something to do with a big chance, and holding this talent competition on the other side is actually a kind of screening. As for more secrets, I can't tell you right now. If you join the top 10, this big opportunity has nothing to do with you. Therefore, you don't need to pay too much attention, just have the source stone reward on the other side. "

Ye Tian understood, this is the Lord of Eternal Zero who doesn't believe that he can take the top ten!

But if you think about it carefully, it's right, how long has he been a genius on the other side, how can he be in the top ten?

"Lord of Eternal Zero, this genius competition, the cultivation is different, how to compete?"

Ye Tian asked.

If it was to compete with his own cultivation, then he could directly give up.

"There will be a special treasure that allows everyone's body host to be at the same level, so there is no need to worry about cultivation. The Lord of Eternal Zero explained.

"Then I'll participate in this talent competition!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll take you there then, after three thousand primeval eras!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero.
